title: Doc2ArchAgent Networks Security YAML Schema
description: Schema for networks-security.yaml — security enrichment overlay for networks.yaml. Zone security posture and infrastructure resources linked by zone_id.

network_security_metadata.description: Security-specific metadata linked to a networks.yaml.

networks_ref.description: Name or ID of the networks.yaml this security overlay enriches.

zone_security.description: Security posture enrichment for network zones. Matched by zone_id.

zone_id.description: References a network_zone ID in networks.yaml.

egress_filtered.description: Whether outbound traffic is filtered. Unfiltered egress enables data exfiltration.

ids_ips_enabled.description: Whether intrusion detection/prevention systems monitor this zone.

dlp_enabled.description: Whether data loss prevention controls are active in this zone.

default_deny.description: Whether the zone defaults to deny-all for inbound traffic. Zero Trust baseline.

allowed_ingress_zones.description: Zone IDs allowed to send traffic into this zone.

allowed_egress_zones.description: Zone IDs this zone is allowed to send traffic to.

infrastructure_resources.description: Security infrastructure resources deployed into network zones — WAFs, IDS/IPS, logging, secrets managers, etc.

resource_type.description: Resource type (waf, load_balancer, logging, monitoring, secrets_manager, iam, hsm, ddos_protection, siem, vulnerability_scanner, container_registry, ids_ips, etc.).
